description: Health Canada approved trametinib in combination with dabrafenib for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with BRAF V600E-mutant low-grade glioma (LGG) requiring systemic therapy.

indication.indication: MEKINIST (trametinib) in combination with dabrafenib is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with low-grade glioma (LGG) with a BRAF V600E mutation who require systemic therapy.
